You may step on a hidden candy and regret it immediately.
A chocolate egg may crumble in an unexpectedly messy way.
Someone may prank you with a cleverly disguised treat.
A minor decoration may fall and create comedic chaos.
You might accidentally mix up the eggs in a silly way.
A random bunny figurine may cause inexplicable confusion.
Your next laugh may trigger a small, harmless disaster.
A hidden treat may vanish as soon as you see it.
Someone’s playful act may backfire on you amusingly.
The universe whispers: 'Even spring has chaos beneath its beauty.'
